resibo.verdict: Walang mahanap na resibo si Perri... 👀

literacyLesson.summary: Sis, mukhang opinion lang ‘to, walang facts na sinusuporta kaya dapat mag-ingat tayo!

points.issue: Walang ebidensya na sumusuporta dito, puro opinyon lang ang nakikita ko, mhie.
points.correction: Dapat may specific facts, figures, o expert opinions para masabi nating credible ang claim.

points.issue: Wala tayong makitang credible sources na nagpapatunay nito, teh.
points.correction: Check natin kung may news articles, studies, or eksperto na nag-validate ng claim na ito para mas sigurado.

literacyLesson.tip: Always look for proof and reliable sources before believing or sharing anything online, okay?
